title: LoraStackHandle sub-trait + LoRA mount/unmount API
goal: Define the LoraStackOps sub-trait reachable through LoraStackHandle: mount, unmount, list_active, set_strength, swap (atomic replace of the active stack). LoRA hot-swap is a PRODUCTION technique (INF-1) and must be supported by both LlamaCppRuntime (via per-request --lora flag) and CandleRuntime (via PEFT-style mount).
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/lora.rs with LoraStackHandle, LoraStackOps, LoraId, LoraDescriptor, LoraStrength, LoraStackSnapshot. mod.rs re-exports.
implementation_notes: Per spec §4.7.1a (LoRA hot-swap PRODUCTION) and AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES the LoRA stack is operator-controllable. LoraId is `Uuid` (v7 per HBR-INT-008). LoraDescriptor: `{ id: LoraId, artifact_path: PathBuf, sha256: [u8;32], rank: u32, target_modules: Vec<String>, base_model_compat: BaseModelTag, license_tag: LicenseTag }`. LoraStackOps trait methods: `async fn mount(&self, desc: LoraDescriptor, strength: LoraStrength) -> Result<(), ModelRuntimeError>`; `async fn unmount(&self, id: LoraId) -> Result<(), ModelRuntimeError>`; `fn list_active(&self) -> Vec<LoraStackEntry>` where LoraStackEntry = `{ id: LoraId, strength: LoraStrength, mounted_at_utc: DateTime<Utc> }`; `async fn set_strength(&self, id: LoraId, strength: LoraStrength) -> Result<(), ModelRuntimeError>`; `async fn swap(&self, new_stack: Vec<(LoraDescriptor, LoraStrength)>) -> Result<LoraStackSnapshot, ModelRuntimeError>` — atomic replace returning the previous stack snapshot for rollback. LoraStrength wraps `f32` clamped 0.0..=2.0 with `try_new` constructor. BaseModelTag opaque string (e.g., "llama-3.1-8b-instruct") so mount errors out when a LoRA targets a different base. License tagging mandatory for downstream Skill Bank reference (per AC-DISTILL-CONTENT-REVIEW). mount/unmount/swap MUST NOT require process restart per AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.a (hot-swap invariant). LoraStackSnapshot for rollback after a failed multi-LoRA swap.
risk_if_missed: LoRA hot-swap (INF-1 PRODUCTION) has no trait surface; mount/unmount semantics drift between adapters.
validator_focus: LoraId minted via now_v7(); base-model-tag mismatch returns typed error; swap is atomic (failure leaves the previous stack intact); strength clamping rejected with try_new error.

minimum_controls: Atomic-swap invariant test: failed swap leaves previous stack intact.
Base-model-tag mismatch rejected with typed error before mount.
Strength clamping enforced at try_new; out-of-range returns Err.
